subject: WS1.4 type review CLEAN/GO; blockers remain
body:
Coordinator update from Luminous Threading Asteroid.

Hubble/type-expert returned CLEAN/GO for WS1.4 type-safety. Non-blocking watch only: the exported JSON-LD record index signature is open, so future consumers should guard known fields rather than trusting record[key] directly.

The active blockers remain Rawls/test classification and Ramanujan assumptions: no-I/O documentLoader constraint, graph-core/domain-boundary fixture semantics, and seam wording. Please continue fixing under claim cdeae6ac, keep staged set empty, rerun graph-core test/type-check/lint/build plus git diff --check, then report updated readiness.
